2026-04-08T17:46:26.0126858Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0130989Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0131655Z 
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0132066Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0138957Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0140531Z 
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0140861Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T17:46:26.0141302Z
